overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character exploring a massive stone temple complex. The character ascends weathered stairs, enters a grand archway, and emerges onto an overlook with floating islands in the sky. The scene transitions to a golden-hour view of Belurat, Tower Settlement, showcasing a vast cityscape of spires and domes.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple entrance with grand staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the weathered stone stairs toward the temple entrance
character enters the massive arched doorway of the stone temple

agents.ego_description: character in tattered blue cloak and large backpack climbing steep stone steps toward an ornate Gothic archway

entered.detail: massive weathered stone structure with intricate carvings and Gothic architectural details
large arched entrance with ornate iron doors and decorative stonework
wide staircase made of aged stone blocks leading up to the temple entrance
tall cylindrical tower with spiral fluting and detailed stone carvings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a massive ancient stone temple facade under an overcast sky. The character ascends a wide weathered staircase toward an ornate Gothic archway, passing between fluted columns. The atmosphere is somber and imposing, with detailed stone carvings visible on the temple exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with view of floating islands and celestial bodies

events.description: character exits the temple interior onto an open stone balcony with panoramic views
character turns right and walks along the edge of the overlook
screen fades to black indicating transition to a new scene

agents.ego_description: character emerges onto a high overlook and walks along the stone edge, surveying the vast landscape with floating structures and a large planet visible in the sky

entered.detail: flat stone terrace with paved tiles extending along the cliff edge
ornate carved column with spiral design supporting the balcony edge
massive crystalline formations and islands floating in the misty distance
enormous planet or moon visible in the cloudy sky above the landscape
ancient tower structures suspended in the air amidst the clouds

segments.scene_description: The character exits the temple onto a wide stone balcony perched on a cliff edge. Twisted stone pillars line the overlook as the camera reveals a breathtaking vista of floating islands, crystalline structures, and a massive celestial body hanging in the overcast sky. The character walks along the edge, exploring the panoramic view of the misty valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high vantage point overlooking the tower settlement of Belurat at sunset

events.description: cut to new viewpoint showing a different character overlooking the city of Belurat
text overlay appears identifying the location as Belurat, Tower Settlement
camera begins slow pan left across the cityscape revealing more towers and spires

agents.ego_description: hooded figure in dark cloak with red lining stands still overlooking the ancient city as the camera pans to reveal the sprawling architecture

entered.detail: dense cluster of ancient towers and domed buildings stretching into the misty distance
multiple rounded towers with pointed spires silhouetted against the golden sky
slender vertical towers rising above the cityscape
enormous cylindrical columns supporting structures above the city
dramatic beams of sunlight breaking through clouds illuminating the city

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a golden-hour view of Belurat, Tower Settlement. A hooded figure stands on a stone overlook as the camera pans across a vast cityscape of domed towers, slender spires, and massive support pillars. Dramatic sun rays pierce through the clouds, casting a warm orange glow over the ancient architecture while text identifies the location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the somber interior of an ancient stone temple to a breathtaking, sun-drenched vista of a celestial cityscape. It begins with a climb up wide, weathered staircases toward an ornate Gothic archway, moving past fluted columns and detailed stone carvings under an overcast sky. As the character exits the temple, the scene opens onto a wide cliffside balcony where twisted pillars frame a panoramic view of floating islands and crystalline structures beneath a massive celestial body. The atmosphere then shifts from a misty, gray valley to the warm orange glow of golden hour as the camera pans across the vast expanse of Belurat, Tower Settlement. Finally, the view expands to reveal a cityscape of domed towers and slender spires pierced by dramatic sun rays.
